channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Andy Burnham Poses a Threat to British Business
item.description: The incoming prime minister appears to have an unwarranted fondness for economic policies that stifle growth.

item.title: Addressing Left-Wing Terrorism
item.description: Secretary of State Rubio argues that vigilance against left-wing political violence has been insufficient.

item.title: World Cup Finalist Hesitates to Shake Trump's Hand if Team Wins
item.description: Spanish forward Borja Iglesias expressed reluctance to shake President Trump's hand should his team win the soccer championship.

item.title: Body Discovered at Boston Home Owned by Rep. Pressley's Husband
item.description: Boston police reported finding a body inside a home owned by the husband of Representative Ayanna Pressley.
